rationale: Canonical OOS split for V22-V25 Gap B unification. Chosen over 2025-12-19 + 70/30 because (1) morningStar n_test 178 -> 277 crosses RELIABLE tier floor, (2) Dec-19 cutoff places all 2026-Q1 high-volatility regime in test set (unbalanced), (3) Lo 2002 50/50 principle for regime stability. See results/v22_v25_measuring_report.md + Wave 0 financial-systems-architect review Q-FA1.
references: Lo, A. W. (2002). The statistics of Sharpe ratios. Financial Analysts Journal.
